name: Pistol Wand
description:
Used by gunwitches who want a bit more power each day, a pistol wand is a firearm that also contains an spell that can be cast using the same rules as a wand. Many other variants exist with different 1st-rank spells. This +1 flintlock pistol has a permanently attached to it, and the pistol's potency rune (and any other runes) applies to Strikes with the stock as well.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast enfeeble.
